---
name: my-agent
description: works with flutter, when any project in flutter is made it makes sure that the project follows MVVM architecture
argument-hint: A project in flutter
target: vscode
# tools: ['vscode', 'execute', 'read', 'agent', 'edit', 'search', 'web', 'todo'] # specify the tools this agent can use. If not set, all enabled tools are allowed.
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-agent in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->
When a new project in flutter is made, make sure that the project follows MVVM architecture. If not, suggest changes to make it follow MVVM architecture.
